system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi, I just made a new account—mei_patel_7272—and placed an order. I have two issues. First, I ordered a 1000-piece intermediate jigsaw, but I think it might be too hard for my little kid. Is it possible to switch it to the easiest puzzle with the fewest pieces?

Second, I might have typed my address wrong when ordering. Could you check what address is on my order and my account? If it’s not 445 Maple Drive, Suite 394, Fort Worth, Texas, 76165, can you help me fix it? Thank you.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm here to help! Before I can assist with your order and address, I need to verify your identity. Could you please provide the email address you used to create your account? This will allow me to securely access your order and profile details.
Sorry, I actually don’t remember which email I used when I signed up. Is there another way you can verify me or help me check my order and address?

No problem! I can also verify your identity using your first name, last name, and zip code. Could you please provide your full name and confirm your zip code (I see you mentioned 76165—please confirm if that's correct)? Once I have this information, I’ll be able to assist you with your order and address.
Yes, my name is Mei Patel and my zip code is 76165. Let me know if you need anything else to verify me.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your information. I’m currently unable to access your account due to a technical issue. 

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further with your order and address update?
Yes, please. That would be great—if someone else can help me with changing the puzzle and checking my address, I’d really appreciate it. Thank you!

arguments.summary: User Mei Patel (zip 76165) needs to check and possibly update the address on her order and account, and wants to switch a 1000-piece intermediate jigsaw puzzle to the easiest puzzle with the fewest pieces. Unable to verify or access account due to technical issues.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for your patience. I’m experiencing a technical issue and am unable to transfer you to a human agent at this moment. 

I recommend reaching out to our customer support team directly through our website or app for immediate assistance. I’m sorry for the inconvenience, and thank you for your understanding. If you have any other questions, please let me know!
Okay, thanks for letting me know. I’ll try contacting support through your website or app. If there’s anything else I need to do, please let me know. Thanks again for your help!

You’re very welcome, Mei! At this point, the best next step is to contact our support team directly through the website or app, as they’ll be able to securely access your account and resolve your order and address issues.

You don’t need to do anything else right now. If you have any other questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Thank you for your understanding, and I hope your issue is resolved quickly!
Thank you, I appreciate your help. I’ll reach out through the website or app. Have a good day!
You're very welcome, Mei! Thank you for your understanding and patience. I hope everything gets sorted out smoothly for you. Have a wonderful day!
Thanks again! Take care.
You're welcome! Take care as well, and have a great day! If you need any help in the future, feel free to reach out.
Will do! Thanks—bye!
Goodbye, Mei! Wishing you all the best. If you need assistance in the future, I’ll be here to help. Have a great day!
Thank you! Goodbye!

arguments.summary: User Mei Patel (zip 76165) needs to check and possibly update the address on her order and account, and wants to switch a 1000-piece intermediate jigsaw puzzle to the easiest puzzle with the fewest pieces. Unable to verify or access account due to technical issues.

final_response: Goodbye, Mei! Wishing you all the best. If you need assistance in the future, I’ll be here to help. Have a great day!
